blockingIssues.description: SDK build output does not provide required dual-module ESM + CJS artifacts; package exports only ESM/types.
SDK `getBalances` API does not match feature contract (`getBalances(address)`); implementation requires extra asset metadata arguments.
Event indexer polling path is effectively unimplemented (`processEventType` no-op), so runtime does not ingest on-chain events as required.
Orderbook depth reconciliation can drift on partial fills because order placement adds original quantity while fill handling does not decrement depth appropriately.
Balance cache is not reconciled on trade/fill events, which can leave `/balances` stale after fills.
WebSocket runtime is not wired to live indexed event/state flow; orderbook/trade/account channel updates are not emitted from real runtime activity.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and enforce test-first expectations: if workers implement before tests, they must mark `followedProcedure: false` with explicit deviation and rationale; optionally relax strict tests-first to 'tests in same change set' if that is accepted practice.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three backend reviews found transcript evidence of implementation before tests while handoffs marked `followedProcedure: true` (features: sdk-core, api-indexer-rest, api-websocket-ratelimit).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add concrete Aptos event polling implementation guidance/checklist (required API calls, pagination/cursor strategy, and expected data mapping) to prevent no-op indexer stubs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: api-indexer-rest review found placeholder polling logic in `api/src/indexer/event-indexer.ts` where runtime event ingestion should occur.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add backend assertion coverage for SDK packaging requirements (dual ESM + CJS outputs and require/import compatibility) when a feature contract states that requirement.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sdk-core review found missing ESM+CJS artifact requirement despite passing VAL-BACKEND-001..005 behavior assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit commit-scoping guidance to avoid unrelated file changes in feature commits unless justified and documented in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sdk-core review noted unrelated frontend config file changes bundled with SDK feature commit.

rejectedObservations.observation: backend-worker tests-first deviation noted in api-indexer-rest review
backend-worker tests-first deviation noted in api-websocket-ratelimit review
